markets.question: Spread: AS Roma (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie A game, scheduled for March 22 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "AS Roma" if AS Roma win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "US Lecce".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaseriea.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: AS Roma vs. US Lecce - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Serie A game, scheduled for March 22 at 1:00 PM ET.

markets.question: Ethereum Up or Down - March 12, 1AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: FC St. Pauli 1910 vs. SC Freiburg: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Bundesliga game between FC St. Pauli 1910 and SC Freiburg, scheduled for March 22 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC St. Pauli 1910 and SC Freiburg combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on bundesliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:

markets.question: Counter-Strike: Misa Esports vs New Project (BO3) - United21 Group B
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Misa Esports and New Project in the United21 Group B, initially scheduled for March 11 at 7:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Misa Esports" if Misa Esports win the match against New Project.

This market will resolve to "New Project" if New Project win the match against Misa Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Spread: Stade Rennais FC 1901 (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for March 22 at 12:15 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Stade Rennais FC 1901" if Stade Rennais FC 1901 win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Metz".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
